Pisa, Italy

Postdoc Researcher in Quantum Computing @ University of Pisa


EDUCATION

Universita di Pisa
Dottorato di Ricerca in Informatica (PhD)
11/2020 - 05/2024
Thesis: Effectiveness of Quantum Algorithms: From Compilation to Measurement.
Supervisors: Anna Bernasconi, Gianna Maria Del Corso, Riccardo Guidotti. Grade: Ottimo.

Universita di Pisa
Laurea Magistrale in Informatica (LM-18)
09/2017 - 06/2020
Thesis: A Fully Distributed IoT Layer using Blockchain & IPFS with Case Study and Formal Analysis. Grade: 110/110 e lode.

Universita di Pisa
Laurea Triennale in Informatica (L-31)
09/2013 - 12/2017
Thesis: Sviluppo di un plugin per visualizzazione ed analisi della blockchain di Bitcoin. Grade: 100/110.


WORK EXPERIENCE

Universita di Pisa - Dipartimento di Fisica
Assegnista di Ricerca (Postdoc Researcher)
04/2024 - Present
Quantum algorithms for Machine Learning. Research on quantum subroutines for matrix/activation functions in quantum ML.

Universita di Pisa - Dipartimento di Informatica
Cultore della Materia in Computazione Quantistica
09/2024 - Present
Teaching support and examination role in Quantum Computing courses.

SQMS Center - Fermilab
Visiting PhD Student
08/2022 - 01/2023
Design and implementation of a quantum reservoir computing model for learning noise-resilient quantum gates on superconductor architectures.

Universita di Pisa - Dipartimento di Informatica
Dottorando (PhD Student)
11/2020 - 05/2024
Research on quantum algorithms effectiveness, from compilation to measurement. Published 24+ papers.

Cinello
Consulente Tecnico (Technical Consultant)
10/2020 - 10/2020
Blockchain training sessions for R&D team. Supervised development of an Ethereum ERC-721 smart contract for digital art tokenization.

IBM Quantum
Qiskit Advocate
10/2023 - Present
Recognized by IBM Quantum for deep knowledge of quantum algorithms and circuits, contributing to the Qiskit Global Community.

Superhero Valley
Fondatore & Head of Mentorship
11/2020 - 09/2025
Founded an Italian community connecting university students with Big Tech. 2300+ members from 8+ universities. Manages mentorship program and corporate relations.

Tocket
Chief Technology Officer
09/2019 - 09/2020
Startup to eliminate ticket scalping at live events. Built payment system with Stripe API, Ethereum smart contracts, Flutter mobile app for Android and iOS.

PointerPodcast
Co-Host
05/2019 - Present
Weekly podcast on research and tech innovation. 230+ episodes. Interviewed experts from NASA, IBM, INFN, Fermilab/SQMS.


SKILLS

Quantum Computing, Quantum Algorithms, Quantum Machine Learning, Quantum State Preparation, Variational Quantum Algorithms, Qiskit, Pennylane, Python, Java, C, C++, Blockchain, Ethereum, Smart Contracts, Flutter, Dart, Machine Learning, Data Science, Neo4j, Graph Algorithms, Scientific Writing, Jupyter, Claude Code, Roo Code, Adobe Premiere, Adobe After Effects, 3D Modeling

PUBLICATIONS

- Quantum subroutine for variance estimation: algorithmic design and applications. Quantum Machine Intelligence 6.2 (2024).
- Quantum Subroutine for Efficient Matrix Multiplication. IEEE Access (2024).
- The role of encodings and distance metrics for the quantum nearest neighbor. Quantum Machine Intelligence 6.2 (2024).
- Quantum clustering with k-Means: A hybrid approach. Theoretical Computer Science 992 (2024).
- XOR-AND-XOR Logic Forms for Autosymmetric Functions and Applications to Quantum Computing. IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems 42.6 (2023).
- Logarithmic Quantum Forking. Proceedings of ESANN (2023).
- Effect of Different Encodings and Distance Functions on Quantum Instance-Based Classifiers. PAKDD 2022, Springer.
- Variational Compression of Circuits for State Preparation. IEEE QCE 2024.
- Quantum Reservoir Computing Approach to Error-Mitigated Compilation. QTML Workshop (2023).
- Outlier Detection and other applications of Quantum Matrix Multiplication. IEEE IPDPSW 2025.
- Variational Decision Trees with Structured Ansatzes. IEEE QCE 2025.
- Efficient quantum state preparation with Bucket Brigade QRAM. Under Revision.


PROJECTS

GNCS Research Project - Quantum Subroutines (PI)
Coordinator of research project on quantum subroutines for matrix/activation functions in quantum ML. Istituto Nazionale di Alta Matematica (2025-2026).

PNRR CN1 - HPC, Big Data and Quantum Computing
National research project at Politecnico di Milano. Study of quantum ML techniques for state preparation and quantum AI subroutines (2024-ongoing).

SoBigData++ (H2020)
European project for Social Mining & Big Data Ecosystem. Produced PyPI package for quantum k-Nearest Neighbors (2020-2024).

PRA-Quantum Computing
University of Pisa research project on quantum computing technologies and applications (2020-2022).

Quantum Festival & Pisa Quantum Festival
Co-organized quantum computing festivals in Pisa with 400+ participants, featuring speakers from academia and industry (2024-2025).


PATENTS

Circuito quantistico per forking di uno stato quantistico
Patent ID: IT202200024873A1. Filed 12/2022, granted 11/2024. Applicant: Universita di Pisa.
